Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs_per_bldg.geometry_building_type_recs, sum(bs_per_bldg.tract_count) AS sample_count, sum(bs_per_bldg.bldg_weight) AS units_count, sum(ts_aggr._inner_rows) / CAST(count(distinct(ts_aggr.bldg_id)) AS DECIMAL) AS rows_per_sample, sum(ts_aggr.bs__elec_minus_gas * bs_per_bldg.bldg_weight) AS elec_minus_gas FROM (SELECT ts_flat.bldg_id AS bldg_id, sum(ts_flat._v__elec_minus_gas) AS bs__elec_minus_gas, count(*) AS _inner_rows FROM (SELECT resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.bldg_id AS bldg_id, resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" - resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" AS _v__elec_minus_gas FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu WHERE resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.upgrade IN (1) AND resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.state IN ('CO', 'WY')) AS ts_flat GROUP BY ts_flat.bldg_id) AS ts_aggr JOIN (SELECT bs.bldg_id AS bldg_id, arbitrary(bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs") AS geometry_building_type_recs, sum(bs.weight) AS bldg_weight, count(*) AS tract_count FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs WHERE bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs."in.state" IN ('CO', 'WY') GROUP BY bs.bldg_id) AS bs_per_bldg ON bs_per_bldg.bldg_id = ts_aggr.bldg_id GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/a816862204fe63b6d55685255bef2e713d2cdfeed75d425ae35cf7d533065217/401ad368-b6a0-488a-92d6-a8c241d8e742/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
